name: bedrock
description: Haffey Enterprises engineering skills spanning the authoring-through-review lifecycle on the house stacks: writing application, infrastructure, agent/LLM-call, and frontend code, testing, code review, structured debugging, authoring decision records (ADR/DDR/SDD), reusable standards, and execution relays, and driving design-record sets to mechanical convergence. Self-contained and auto-discovered per skill. Service-side skills are stack-bound to Python 3.11+/FastAPI/async-SQLAlchemy/GCP/GitHub; the frontend skill binds TypeScript/React/Vite with plain CSS on design tokens. A different stack is a rebind, not a line-edit.
